title: Expressions that signify a person’s title

iii. Nominalization where a verb or an adjecti ve is changed to a noun by adding suff
evidence.clean_text: From Lataiwish’s (1995, p.256) perspective, expressions that signify a person’s title such as; استاذ، سيادة، سعادة، حضرة، سيدناare commonly used in Arabic.
